Lord Mandelson released on bail after arrest on suspicion of misconduct in public officeThe Metropolitan Police says a 72-year-old man has been released on bail pending further investigation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8xy5jzrrxzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8xy5jzrrxzo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 02:25:41 GMT

Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' ordersFour men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:02:13 GMT
First British baby born using transplanted womb from deceased donor Grace Bell, who was born without a viable womb, says her little boy is "simply a miracle". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:39:50 GMT
Victims 'devastated' by train CCTV failures that allow sex offenders to go untracedSex offenders on trains are escaping justice because of serious issues with CCTV on the rail network - BBC investigation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6746rydro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6746rydro#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:01:25 GMT
Chocolate kept in anti-theft boxes as retailers warn it's being stolen to orderRetailers and police forces tell the BBC that thieves are targeting chocolate and selling it on. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:07:42 GMT

Trump's new global tariff comes into effect at 10%The president threatened to raise the tariff to 15% but has not yet issued an official directive to increase the rate. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6zn3ly22yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6zn3ly22yo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:50:21 GMT

Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lordA wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lp7xwql4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lp7xwql4o#0 Mon, 23 Feb 2026 21:12:47 GMT
